title: Top three dates with highest closed‑lost orders
description: On 2026-04-15 the business recorded the highest number of closed‑lost orders (6) resulting in $3,524,311.11 of revenue loss. The next two worst dates, 2026-03-15 and 2026-05-15, each had 5 lost orders, costing $946,541.39 and $2,930,875.84 respectively. Combined, these three dates represent a total lost revenue of $7,401,728.34.
audit_sql:
SELECT
    OrderDate,
    COUNT(*) AS lost_orders,
    SUM(Revenue) AS total_lost_revenue
FROM active_dataset
WHERE Status = 'Closed Lost'
GROUP BY OrderDate
ORDER BY lost_orders DESC
LIMIT 3;

title: Prioritize High Revenue‑Per‑Customer Product‑Region Pairs for Quarterly Revenue Boost
description: The analysis shows that the five product‑region combinations with the highest average revenue per customer range from $103,824.29 for Laptop‑South to $60,286.33 for Smartphone‑North. Together they generate a combined average revenue per customer of $418,489.56, representing the most efficient revenue sources for the business.
audit_sql:
WITH quarterly_eff AS (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', OrderDate) AS quarter,
           Product,
           Region,
           SUM(Revenue) AS total_rev,
           SUM(Customers) AS total_cust
    FROM active_dataset
    GROUP BY quarter, Product, Region
), efficiency AS (
    SELECT Product,
           Region,
           AVG(total_rev / NULLIF(total_cust, 0)) AS avg_rev_per_cust
    FROM quarterly_eff
    GROUP BY Product, Region
)
SELECT Product,
       Region,
       avg_rev_per_cust
FROM efficiency
ORDER BY avg_rev_per_cust DESC
LIMIT 5;

title: Optimal Quantity of Products to Stock in the North Region
description: The optimal quantity of Laptops to stock in the North region is 27, based on the maximum revenue generated.
audit_sql: SELECT Product, MAX(Quantity) AS OptimalQuantity FROM active_dataset WHERE Region = 'North' AND Revenue = (SELECT MAX(Revenue) FROM active_dataset WHERE Region = 'North') GROUP BY Product LIMIT 1000

title: Revenue Difference Between Order Statuses
description: The average revenue for 'Closed Won' orders is $462,408.02, while for 'Active' orders it is $449,342.60. In contrast, 'Closed Lost' orders have an average revenue of $446,855.05.
audit_sql: SELECT Status, AVG(Revenue) AS AverageRevenue FROM active_dataset GROUP BY Status ORDER BY AverageRevenue DESC LIMIT 1000

title: Revenue and Quantity Discrepancy
description: Some orders have higher revenue despite having lower quantity sold. For example, Order ID 'ORD-5085' has a revenue of $859,638.76 with only 15 units sold, while Order ID 'ORD-5089' has a revenue of $837,244.82 with 16 units sold. The average revenue per customer for these orders is not explicitly stated, but the highest revenue per order is $859,638.76.
audit_sql: SELECT OrderID, Product, Quantity, Revenue, Customers FROM active_dataset WHERE Quantity < (SELECT AVG(Quantity) FROM active_dataset) AND Revenue > (SELECT AVG(Revenue) FROM active_dataset) ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 1000

title: Revenue Prediction Based on Quantity Sold and Region
description: For the North region, a Laptop sale with a quantity of 23 has produced a revenue of $1,283,895.66. In contrast, a Smartphone sale with a quantity of 20 has generated a revenue of $611,501.06.
audit_sql: SELECT Product, Region, Quantity, Revenue FROM active_dataset LIMIT 1000

title: Average Revenue Per Customer in Each Region
description: The average revenue per customer in the North region is $57,538.45, while in the South region it is $57,280.49. The East region has an average revenue per customer of $38,516.51.
audit_sql: SELECT Region, AVG(Revenue / Customers) AS AverageRevenuePerCustomer FROM active_dataset WHERE Status = 'Closed Won' GROUP BY Region LIMIT 1000

title: North Region Product Performance
description: The North region has generated $2,890,815.65 in revenue from Smartphone sales, with 94 units sold. In contrast, Laptop sales have produced $7,548,672.36 in revenue, with 137 units sold. Meanwhile, Tablet sales have generated $1,719,960.07 in revenue, with 99 units sold, and Headphones sales have produced $234,126.07 in revenue, with 94 units sold.
audit_sql: SELECT Product, SUM(Revenue) AS TotalRevenue, SUM(Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM active_dataset WHERE Region = 'North' GROUP BY Product LIMIT 1000
